<current_datetime>2026-04-05T01:34:35.420Z</current_datetime>

I want to run only the SmsNotificationTests from this TUnit project. What's the command?

input.initialPrompt: I want to run only the SmsNotificationTests from this TUnit project. What's the command?

data.content:
Run:

```
dotnet run --filter "/**/*.SmsNotificationTests.*"
```

TUnit uses `dotnet run` (not `dotnet test`). The `--filter` flag with the glob pattern `/**/*.SmsNotificationTests.*` matches all tests in that class. This will run `SendSms_HealthCheck` and `SendSms_ValidPhone_Succeeds`.
